positioning.whatIsIt: A chat API and SDK that lets developers add production-ready in-app messaging (1-on-1, group, public) in minutes — with pre-built UI components and SDKs for 14+ frameworks.
positioning.whatIsItNot: Not a standalone chat app. Not a basic widget. It's full messaging infrastructure with customizable UI, moderation, AI bot support, and enterprise-grade security.
positioning.keyTakeaway: Ship in-app chat in minutes instead of months. Pre-built UIs you can customize to look exactly like your product.
positioning.wordOfMouth: We dropped months of dev time using their pre-built chat UIs, and we could still make it look exactly like our product.
positioning.competitors: Direct: Stream Chat, Twilio, Firebase. Indirect: building chat from scratch in-house. Manual: stitching together WebSocket servers, databases, and UI from scratch.
positioning.howDifferent: Pre-built pixel-perfect UI components across 14+ frameworks. AI-ready bot integration. 130M+ monthly messages, 24B+ API calls at scale. GDPR-compliant, TLS v1.3, 99.9% uptime SLA.
positioning.whyUsersWant: Launch chat features fast without building from scratch. Marketplace buyer-seller messaging. White-label chat for SaaS. AI chatbot integration. Global scale without infrastructure headaches.
positioning.objections: Will it look like our product or generic? Can it handle our scale? Is the data secure/GDPR compliant? How hard is integration with our stack? What happens if we outgrow the free tier?
